tluaSelfReservedNames.tlua(3,12): error TLUA2427: Interface name cannot be 'self'.
tluaSelfReservedNames.tlua(7,7): error TLUA2457: Type alias name cannot be 'self'.
tluaSelfReservedNames.tlua(10,15): error TLUA2368: Type parameter name cannot be 'self'.


==== tluaSelfReservedNames.tlua (3 errors) ====
    // The receiver type is unshadowable in the type namespace.
    do
    	interface self {}
    	          ~~~~
!!! error TLUA2427: Interface name cannot be 'self'.
    end
    
    do
    	type self = string;
    	     ~~~~
!!! error TLUA2457: Type alias name cannot be 'self'.
    end
    
    interface Box<self> {
                  ~~~~
!!! error TLUA2368: Type parameter name cannot be 'self'.
    	value: self;
    }
